title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on users' computers and automates daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications. It supports complex workflow automation and is available only in Claude Pro and Max subscription plans.
